site.title: petitchardon | graphic design, illustration & copywriting freelance
site.description: Freelance graphic designer, illustrator and copywriter based in Rambouillet (Yvelines, France). petitchardon crafts immersive, responsible visual identities that tell your story.
site.ogTitle: petitchardon | graphic design & visual storytelling studio
site.ogDescription: Creative studio in Rambouillet (Yvelines, France): I craft brand identities like telling a story — yours.

hero.title: make your brand impossible to forget
hero.location: Graphic designer & web designer in Rambouillet (Yvelines), creating logos, visual identities and websites.
hero.intro: I craft brand identities the same way I tell a story: yours. I help daring brands leave a lasting mark in everyone's imagination.
hero.services: logo - visual identity - website - social media - illustration

process.title: from spark to launch
process.intro: A four-step method to reveal an aligned, singular and memorable identity.
process.step1Body: You share your brief, I gather your needs, goals and constraints to frame the collaboration.
process.step2Body: I explore, sketch and build visual and editorial routes to give life to your universe.
process.step3Body: I present the concepts, we exchange live, you share feedback to polish every detail.
process.step4Body: I finalise the deliverables and we launch your new communication together.
process.commitIntro: Accessibility, eco-design and performance are woven into each step so your story shines for everyone.
process.commit1: Contrasts audited, keyboard navigation and structured markup keep assistive technologies aligned.
process.commit2: Lightweight assets and progressive loading keep the experience fast and energy-conscious.
process.commit3: Inclusive tone and multilingual paths invite every audience to step into your universe.

portfolio.title: identities that resonate
portfolio.intro: Each project is a graphic exploration powered by your narrative. Discover a few recent highlights.
portfolio.card1Body: Logotype design and product range variations.
portfolio.card2Body: Visual identity design and social media strategy.
portfolio.card3Body: LinkedIn editorial calendar, template design and post management.
portfolio.ctaBody: Ready to make your identity vibrate? Let’s imagine what we can craft together.

about.title: i'm anne
about.portraitAlt: Portrait of Anne, designer behind petitchardon
about.p1: I'm Anne, the designer behind petitchardon. Since childhood, creation has been my playground: inventing worlds, telling stories, imagining adventures.
about.p2Strong: Today I channel that creativity into your narratives to turn them into remarkable, memorable visual identities.
about.p3: My approach is direct, warm and action-oriented: I guide you towards a vision that feels true to you and impossible to ignore.
about.pillar1Strong: You speak, I listen. Honest, fluid conversations turn your intuitions into tangible creative directions.
about.pillar1Body: My background in psychology helps refine your needs. petit chardon becomes your teammate to get you noticed.
about.pillar2Strong: Design, illustration and copywriting blend together to build vibrant, cohesive worlds — from logo to manifesto.
about.pillar2Body: From identity to social media, coherence is your strength. Let's craft your signature language.
about.pillar3Strong: Brand kits, guidelines, templates and editorial content: leave with concrete deliverables ready to amplify your voice.
about.pillar3Body: I stay by your side to run and grow your social channels over time.

lukes-iced-coffees.intro: An iced-coffee brand to bottle in a sign as refreshing as the product itself. The logotype is built like a shop-window object: a clean silhouette, a citron straw for the bright note, a rigorous grid to carry it everywhere.
lukes-iced-coffees.section1Body: Drawn on a grid, the monogram holds in a single curve — legible large on a sign and small on a cap alike. The citron straw places the one vivid accent: an instant signal of freshness.
lukes-iced-coffees.section1Caption: Logotype construction on grid, citron reserve.
lukes-iced-coffees.section2Body: Deep indigo, iced teal, pale mint: three cool tones that travel from glass to carton, from web to label, without ever losing the brand.
lukes-iced-coffees.section2Caption: Range palette — from indigo to mint.

intelligences-atypiques.intro: Giving shape to singularity: every atypical mind is a node in a wider network. The identity is built around a constellation of circles — distinct, connected, never reducible to a single model.
intelligences-atypiques.section1Body: A modular brand motif: the same circle, declined in solids, outlines and reserves, composes an endless visual alphabet. Citron lights only on the spark — the instant an idea leaps out.
intelligences-atypiques.section2Body: Clear, well-paced post templates, built to keep the cadence of a regular voice while letting each message breathe.
intelligences-atypiques.coverCaption: Master plate — the constellation of minds.

cocobot.intro: Structuring a LinkedIn presence the way you hang an exhibition: a clear thread, a steady cadence, pieces in dialogue. The calendar becomes the scenography; each post, a plate.
cocobot.section1Body: A family of carousel templates, adaptable from one topic to the next without breaking coherence. The brand holds, post after post, week after week.
cocobot.section2Body: An editorial calendar that paces the voice — highlights, breathers, reminders. Consistency builds brand memory.
